title: How do I edit the people displayed in the Workload widget?
excerpt: I am setting up a dashboard for all the projects in my teams workspace, but I only want to see the workload for my team. There are people allocated items on boards in my workspace that aren’t part of my team. How do I ed…

posts.author: janelegall (Jane)
posts.cookedHtml: I am setting up a dashboard for all the projects in my teams workspace, but I only want to see the workload for my team. There are people allocated items on boards in my workspace that aren’t part of my team. How do I edit the people displayed in the Workload widget?
